untranslatable_reason: The signal requires the 'open buy put-call ratio' indicator, which is not available in the allowed indicators list. This is a derivatives market microstructure measure (option volume data) that cannot be constructed from the standard price/volume/technical indicators provided. The negative coefficient (-52.6) and t-statistic (-32.9) suggest a strong predictive relationship, but without access to option volume data (open buy put-call ratio), the exact condition cannot be translated. As a fallback proxy, zscore_20 < 0 was used to represent a 'low' relative condition, but this is NOT equivalent to the original signal.
translation_notes: Original signal relies on option market microstructure data (open buy put-call ratio) which is outside the scope of allowed indicators. The signal indicates: when put-call ratio is LOW (below median), expect positive next-day returns. Hold period is 1 day. Study period: 1990-2001. Indices: OEX, SPX, NDX.
